description: Los Chapitos is a splinter faction of the Sinaloa Cartel in Mexico, formed around 2016 by the sons of Joaquín 'El Chapo' Guzmán. The group emerged after Guzmán's capture and extradition, taking control of large parts of the cartel's territory in Sinaloa and neighboring states. They are known for drug trafficking, violence, and conflicts with rival factions and government forces. The group remains active as of the article's last update.

country_links.evidence_quote: montaron operaciones industriales para 'inundar de fentanilo las calles' de EE.UU.
country_links.context: Los Chapitos trafficked fentanyl into the United States and were indicted there.
